title: Market Structure in ICT Trading
seoTitle: Market Structure ICT Trading: Master Price Action | R2F Trading
seoDescription: Learn market structure in ICT trading with expert coach Harvest Wright. Master breaks of structure, liquidity sweeps & market phases for better trades.
headline: Master Market Structure in ICT Trading Like a Pro
subheadline: Learn to read market structure like institutional traders and identify high-probability setups using proven ICT concepts. Transform your trading with proper market structure analysis.

keyPoints.title: Break of Structure (BOS)
keyPoints.text: Master the art of identifying when market structure breaks and shifts direction. Learn to spot valid breaks versus fake-outs that trap retail traders.

keyPoints.title: Change of Character (ChoCh)
keyPoints.text: Understand how market character changes signal potential reversals. Identify the subtle shifts that precede major price movements before they happen.

keyPoints.title: Liquidity Sweeps & Raids
keyPoints.text: Learn how smart money hunts stops above highs and below lows. Identify liquidity pools and predict where institutional players will strike next.

keyPoints.title: Market Phases & Cycles
keyPoints.text: Recognize accumulation, manipulation, and distribution phases. Trade with the institutional flow by understanding market maker business models.

keyPoints.title: Higher & Lower Timeframe Structure
keyPoints.text: Align multiple timeframe structures for confluence. Learn how daily structure influences 4H setups and how 4H structure affects 1H entries.
